'''âsh-j-p''' ('''kashajap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yarnbomb|yarnbomb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yarnbomb|yarnbomb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-j-p
|-
! Lemma
| kashajap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishajap|thishajap]] || [[word:jishajap|jishajap]] || [[word:shishajap|shishajap]] || [[word:kishajap|kishajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushajap|thuthushajap]] || [[word:jujushajap|jujushajap]] || [[word:shushushajap|shushushajap]] || [[word:kukushajap|kukushajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushajap|thushajap]] || [[word:jushajap|jushajap]] || [[word:shushajap|shushajap]] || [[word:kushajap|kushajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushajap|thushajap]] || [[word:jushajap|jushajap]] || [[word:shushajap|shushajap]] || [[word:kushajap|kushajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshajap|theshajap]] || [[word:jeshajap|jeshajap]] || [[word:sheshajap|sheshajap]] || [[word:keshajap|keshajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshajap|thothoshajap]] || [[word:jojoshajap|jojoshajap]] || [[word:shoshoshajap|shoshoshajap]] || [[word:kokoshajap|kokoshajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshajap|thoshajap]] || [[word:joshajap|joshajap]] || [[word:shoshajap|shoshajap]] || [[word:koshajap|koshajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshajap|thoshajap]] || [[word:joshajap|joshajap]] || [[word:shoshajap|shoshajap]] || [[word:koshajap|koshajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshajap|thĂŠshajap]] || [[word:jĂŠshajap|jĂŠshajap]] || [[word:shĂŠshajap|shĂŠshajap]] || [[word:kĂŠshajap|kĂŠshajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashajap|thathashajap]] || [[word:jajashajap|jajashajap]] || [[word:shashashajap|shashashajap]] || [[word:kakashajap|kakashajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashajap|thashajap]] || [[word:jashajap|jashajap]] || [[word:shashajap|shashajap]] || [[word:kashajap|kashajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashajap|thashajap]] || [[word:jashajap|jashajap]] || [[word:shashajap|shashajap]] || [[word:kashajap|kashajap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashajap|shashajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashajap|goshashajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashajap|gokishashajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashajapnĂŒ|shashajapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashajapnknĂŒ|goshashajapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashajapnĂŒ|gokishashajapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashajapshĂ«|shashajapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashajapnkshĂ«|goshashajapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashajapshĂ«|gokishashajapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashajapro|shashajapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashajapnkro|goshashajapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashajapro|gokishashajapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashajapmu|shashajapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashajapnkmu|goshashajapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashajapmu|gokishashajapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashajapsher|shashajapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashajapnksher|goshashajapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashajapsher|gokishashajapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashajapng|shashajapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashajapnkng|goshashajapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashajapng|gokishashajapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashajapya|shashajapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashajapnkya|goshashajapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashajapya|gokishashajapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashajapyam|shashajapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashajapnkyam|goshashajapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashajapyam|gokishashajapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashajapnĂŒshĂ«|shashajapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashajapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashajapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashajapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashajapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashajapnĂŒro|shashajapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashajapnknĂŒro|goshashajapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashajapnĂŒro|gokishashajapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashajapnĂŒmu|shashajapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashajapnknĂŒmu|goshashajapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashajapnĂŒmu|gokishashajapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashajapshĂ«nĂŒ|shashajapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashajapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashajapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashajapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashajapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashajapshĂ«ro|shashajapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashajapnkshĂ«ro|goshashajapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashajapshĂ«ro|gokishashajapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashajapshĂ«mu|shashajapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashajapnkshĂ«mu|goshashajapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashajapshĂ«mu|gokishashajapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashajapronĂŒ|shashajapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashajapnkronĂŒ|goshashajapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashajapronĂŒ|gokishashajapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashajaproshĂ«|shashajaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashajapnkroshĂ«|goshashajapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashajaproshĂ«|gokishashajaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashajapromu|shashajapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashajapnkromu|goshashajapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashajapromu|gokishashajapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashajapmunĂŒ|shashajapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashajapnkmunĂŒ|goshashajapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashajapmunĂŒ|gokishashajapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashajapmushĂ«|shashajapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashajapnkmushĂ«|goshashajapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashajapmushĂ«|gokishashajapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashajapmuro|shashajapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashajapnkmuro|goshashajapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashajapmuro|gokishashajapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
